Top of Descent Passenger Address Generator
Arrival PA Guide
Qatar Airways reference model
TOP OF DESCENT PA â€” REFERENCE

Qatar Airways official reference model (Top of Descent)

Good [morning/afternoon/evening] ladies and gentlemen. This is your [Captain/First Officer] speaking. We trust you're having a pleasant flight with us today. We'll be starting our descent into [CITY], [AIRPORT NAME] shortly, and should be landing in about [MINUTES] minutes. It's a [WEATHER] day today, with a temperature of [TEMP] [°C/°F]. The local time now is [TIME]. On behalf of all the crew, we wish you a very pleasant stay in [CITY], or a smooth onward journey. It's been our pleasure having you on board today. Thank you for choosing Qatar Airways, The World's Best Airline.
